sentences.arabic: آلَةُ الْعُودِ هِيَ مِنْ أَقْدَمِ الْآلَاتِ الْمُوسِيقِيَّةِ فِي الْعَالَمِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Oud je jedan od najstarijih muzičkih instrumenata u arapskom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: The oud is one of the oldest musical instruments in the Arab world.

sentences.arabic: لَهَا صَوْتٌ عَذْبٌ يَبْعَثُ الْهُدُوءَ فِي النَّفْسِ.
sentences.translation: Ima blag zvuk koji unosi mir u dušu.
sentences.translationEn: It has a sweet sound that brings tranquility to the soul.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْفَنَّانُونَ الْعُودَ لِعَزْفِ الْأَلْحَانِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ وَالْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Umjetnici koriste oud za sviranje tradicionalnih i modernih melodija.
sentences.translationEn: Artists use the oud to play traditional and modern melodies.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ كَيْفِيَّةَ الْعَزْفِ عَلَيْهِ فِي الْمَعَاهِدِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi uče kako da ga sviraju u institutima.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people learn how to play it in institutes.

sentences.arabic: تُعَبِّرُ هَذِهِ الْمُوسِيقَى عَنْ مَشَاعِرِ النَّاسِ وَتَارِيخِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ova muzika izražava osjećanja ljudi i njihovu historiju.
sentences.translationEn: This music expresses people's feelings and their history.
